findings.evidence: `ClassNumberUnitSquares.lean:85` and `:94` define the one-parameter square-index variants, but grep shows quotient variants only at `:103` and `:122`; `UnitSquaresCorollaries.lean:94-98` confirms the quotient cardinality is the square index via `TauCeti.card_elementaryTwoQuotient_eq_index_square`.
findings.fix: Derive the quotient product theorems from `classNumber_mul_units_sq_index_le*` by rewriting with `TauCeti.card_elementaryTwoQuotient_eq_index_square`, and add the quotient `of_abs_discr_le` and `of_finrank_le` variants to match the index API.
findings.issue: The elementary-2 quotient product is only provided for the exact discriminant/degree bound and the two-parameter monotone form, while the parallel square-index API also has the one-parameter `of_abs_discr_le` and `of_finrank_le` forms.

summary: The square-index product API is at the right level, but the elementary-2 quotient form is under-generalized and duplicates the same argument instead of being derived from the index form.
